entry.title: ornith
entry.summary: A self-improving family of open-source models for agentic coding
entry.content:
A self-improving family of open-source models for agentic coding

Pulls: 17.2K

Tags: 9

entry.title: north-mini-code-1.0
entry.summary: North Mini Code is Cohere's first model for developers — a 30B Mixture-of-Experts model with 3B active parameters, built for agentic software engineering.
entry.content:
North Mini Code is Cohere's first model for developers — a 30B Mixture-of-Experts model with 3B active parameters, built for agentic software engineering.

Pulls: 13.2K

Tags: 7

entry.title: glm-5.2
entry.summary: GLM-5.2 is Z.ai’s flagship model for the era of long-horizon tasks.
entry.content:
GLM-5.2 is Z.ai’s flagship model for the era of long-horizon tasks.

Pulls: 114.4K

Tags: 1

entry.title: kimi-k2.7-code
entry.summary: Kimi K2.7 Code is Moonshot AI's coding-focused agentic model built upon Kimi K2.6, with substantial improvements on real-world long-horizon coding tasks and roughly 30% lower thinking-token usage.
entry.content:
Kimi K2.7 Code is Moonshot AI's coding-focused agentic model built upon Kimi K2.6, with substantial improvements on real-world long-horizon coding tasks and roughly 30% lower thinking-token usage.

Pulls: 47.2K

Tags: 1

entry.title: granite4.1-guardian
entry.summary: Granite Guardian 4.1 is a specialized safety and judging model from IBM Research that evaluates whether LLM prompts and responses meet specified harm criteria.
entry.content:
Granite Guardian 4.1 is a specialized safety and judging model from IBM Research that evaluates whether LLM prompts and responses meet specified harm criteria.

Pulls: 1,480

Tags: 16

entry.title: nemotron-3-ultra
entry.summary: NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Ultra is built for high-throughput reasoning and long-running agent workflows.
entry.content:

Pulls: 15.6K

entry.title: qwen3.6
entry.summary: Qwen3.6 delivers substantial upgrades in agentic coding and thinking preservation than previous Qwen models.
entry.content:

entry.title: granite4.1
entry.summary: IBM Granite Models are a family of enterprise-ready, open foundation models that support multilingual capabilities, coding, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), tool use, and structured JSON output. Released under Apache 2.0 license.
entry.content:
IBM Granite Models are a family of enterprise-ready, open foundation models that support multilingual capabilities, coding, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), tool use, and structured JSON output. Released under Apache 2.0 license.

Pulls: 205.5K

Tags: 48

entry.title: mistral-medium-3.5
entry.summary: Mistral Medium 3.5 is the first flagship model of Mistral AI that merged instruction-following, reasoning, and coding in a single set of 128B weights.
entry.content:
Mistral Medium 3.5 is the first flagship model of Mistral AI that merged instruction-following, reasoning, and coding in a single set of 128B weights.

Pulls: 118.6K

Tags: 5

entry.title: laguna-xs.2
entry.summary: Laguna XS.2 is a 33B total parameter Mixture-of-Experts model with 3B activated parameters per token designed for agentic coding and long-horizon work on a local machine.
entry.content:
Laguna XS.2 is a 33B total parameter Mixture-of-Experts model with 3B activated parameters per token designed for agentic coding and long-horizon work on a local machine.

Pulls: 18.6K

Tags: 7

entry.title: nemotron3
entry.summary: NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Nano Omni is a multimodal large language model that unifies video, audio, image, and text understanding to support enterprise-grade Q&A, summarization, transcription, and document intelligence workflows.
entry.content:
NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Nano Omni is a multimodal large language model that unifies video, audio, image, and text understanding to support enterprise-grade Q&A, summarization, transcription, and document intelligence workflows.

Pulls: 611.7K

Tags: 4

entry.title: deepseek-v4-pro
entry.summary: DeepSeek-V4-Pro is a frontier Mixture-of-Experts model with a large context window and three reasoning modes.
entry.content:
DeepSeek-V4-Pro is a frontier Mixture-of-Experts model with a large context window and three reasoning modes.

Pulls: 162.7K

Tags: 1

entry.title: deepseek-v4-flash
entry.summary: DeepSeek-V4-Flash is a preview of the DeepSeek-V4 series, a Mixture-of-Experts model with 284B total parameters and 13B activated, built for efficient reasoning across a 1M-token context window.
entry.content:
DeepSeek-V4-Flash is a preview of the DeepSeek-V4 series, a Mixture-of-Experts model with 284B total parameters and 13B activated, built for efficient reasoning across a 1M-token context window.

Pulls: 166.3K

Tags: 1

entry.title: medgemma
entry.summary: MedGemma is a collection of Gemma 3 variants that are trained for performance on medical text and image comprehension.
entry.content:
MedGemma is a collection of Gemma 3 variants that are trained for performance on medical text and image comprehension.

Pulls: 106.3K

Tags: 9

entry.title: medgemma1.5
entry.summary: MedGemma 1.5 4B is an updated version of the MedGemma 4B model.
entry.content:

Pulls: 52.1K

Tags: 5

entry.title: glm-5.1
entry.summary: GLM-5.1 is our next-generation flagship model for agentic engineering, with significantly stronger coding capabilities than its predecessor. It achieves state-of-the-art performance on SWE-Bench Pro and leads GLM-5 by a wide margin.
entry.content:
GLM-5.1 is our next-generation flagship model for agentic engineering, with significantly stronger coding capabilities than its predecessor. It achieves state-of-the-art performance on SWE-Bench Pro and leads GLM-5 by a wide margin.

Pulls: 2.3M

Tags: 1
